text:
>>>>> "Edwin" == Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> writes:

    Edwin> Maintainer of chinese/fqterm, Please note that PR
    Edwin> ports/134894 has just been submitted.

    Edwin> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a
    Edwin> bug fix you agree on, reply to this email stating that you
    Edwin> approve the patch and a committer will take care of it.

    Edwin> The full text of the PR can be found at:
    Edwin> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/134894

    Edwin> -- Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
    Edwin> edwin@FreeBSD.org


The patch is OK.

Thanks for you all.
